assertions.name: Doc citations use full URLs, not filename shorthand
assertions.description: Plan does NOT contain filename-shorthand link text patterns where the visible link text is a `.html` filename but the href carries the full URL. Per the SKILL.md 'Full URLs in citation link text' rule, every doc citation must render the full URL visibly. Fail conditions: (a) markdown link patterns matching the regex `\[[a-z0-9_/-]+\.html\]\(https://` (e.g., '[migrate-cc.html](https://...)', '[cluster-types.html](https://...)', '[aws-pni.html](https://...)'); (b) bare bracketed shorthand without a link, matching the regex `\(\[[a-z0-9_/-]+\.html\]\)` (e.g., '([cluster-types.html])'); (c) bare filename mentions in prose where the filename ends in `.html` but no URL appears within 80 characters before or after (e.g., 'per private-networking.html' with no surrounding URL). Pass conditions: bare URLs in text (most renderers auto-link), URL as both link text and href (`[https://...](https://...)`), or descriptive labels paired with the bare URL elsewhere in surrounding prose.

assertions.description: Plan's Networking Decision section contains substring evidence of the PNI cost mechanism: at minimum 'cross-AZ traffic' (PNI's charge basis) AND at least one of 'data processing fees', 'hourly endpoint fees', 'data processing', or 'endpoint fees' (PrivateLink's charge basis). assertions.description: The output states the unauthenticated-listener clients must move to a Confluent-Cloud-supported auth method before cutover. Passes if a substring matching 'CC-supported method' (or 'API keys / OAuth / mTLS' or 'Confluent-supported method') co-occurs with 'before cutover' (or 'pre-migration' / 'Pre-Migration Workstream').

evals.prompt: Here's my migration profile. Write the Plan to a file.
evals.expected_output: Ten substantially-identical clusters plus two outliers (one differing on scale, one on auth). The output renders the 10 identical clusters as one 'similar clusters' bucket with a member list and shared decisions stated once, and itemizes the two outliers separately, naming the dimension each differs on. The trigger is similarity (2+ identical), not a count threshold.

assertions.name: Output renders a 'similar clusters' bucket with a member list
assertions.description: Output contains a 'similar clusters' bucket heading (case-insensitive substring 'similar clusters') with a member list naming multiple of the identical clusters (at least two of the 'ingest-' cluster names, e.g., 'ingest-01', 'ingest-02').

assertions.name: Outlier clusters are itemized separately with the differing dimension named
assertions.description: The two outliers appear itemized outside the bucket, each with its distinct dimension named. Passes if 'analytics-heavy' appears with a scale/partition/throughput differentiator AND 'partner-mtls' appears with an auth differentiator ('mtls' / 'mTLS').

assertions.name: Bucket states shared decisions once
assertions.description: The 'similar clusters' bucket states the shared decisions (cluster type, networking, switchover, and/or auth) once for the group rather than repeating them per cluster. Passes if the bucket section contains a shared-decisions line naming at least two of: cluster type ('Enterprise'), networking ('PNI'), switchover ('Cluster Linking'), auth.
